ops.title: Rollout: routing stamp rides the cc-guides pull model (claude-rules pack guide + 22-consumer swap + repo-bootstrap 0.42.0 + 18-repo migration)

ops.text: All 41 repos (23 consumers + 18 migrants) render CLAUDE.md from the cc-skills:claude-rules import; zero claude-specific-rules fragments remain; every guides.yml check green; repo-bootstrap v0.42.0 tests + scaffold smoke green; daily cron verified firing or fallback dispatcher approved
